title: About Copyright News
subtitle: Independent digital publication covering the intersection of technology, culture, and creativity.
mission_text: We exist to document and analyze the rapidly evolving landscape of technology and influencer culture. From groundbreaking AI developments to the creators redefining entertainment, our goal is to provide context, insight, and stories that matter.
story_text:
Founded in 2026, Copyright News emerged from a simple observation: the digital world was moving faster than traditional media could keep up. We built a platform that moves at the speed of the internet without sacrificing depth or quality.

What started as a small newsletter has grown into a full-fledged publication covering tech, influencers, and the creator economy — read by thousands of readers worldwide.

values.title: Independence
values.text: We are not owned by any corporation or platform. Our editorial decisions are our own.

values.title: Depth
values.text: We prioritize understanding over speed. When we cover a story, we aim to tell you something you didn't know.

values.title: Community
values.text: We believe in open source and giving back. Our tools and platform are built with transparency in mind.
